# HTTP

- [Attributes](#attributes)

## Attributes

Attributes defined in the `http` namespace. Application developers are encouraged to reuse existing attributes; see these [naming recommendations](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/naming/#recommendations-for-application-developers) regarding attribute selection and naming for custom use cases.

| Key | Stability | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <a id="http-request-method">`http.request.method`</a> | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | string | HTTP request method. | `GET` |
